sqlMap.select: SELECT rowindex, rowcount, idx, username, description, deptname FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( ORDER BY A.idx DESC ) rowindex, COUNT(A.idx) OVER ( ) rowcount, A.idx, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN username WHEN '2' THEN username2 ELSE username2 END username , CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN B.description WHEN '2' THEN B.description2 ELSE B.description2 END description, CASE #v_LANGDATA# WHEN '1' THEN departmentname WHEN '2' THEN departmentname2 ELSE departmentname2 END deptname FROM EZPIMS.TBLSCHEDULE_PUBLIC_DEPARTMENT A INNER JOIN EZHRMASTER.TBLUSERMASTER B ON A.usercn = B.cn ) PUBLIC_DEPARTMEN
